items.name: opendetail-client
items.title: OpenDetail Client
items.description: Canonical NDJSON transport for OpenDetail with endpoint, headers, credentials, and typed error handling.

items.name: use-opendetail
items.title: useOpenDetail
items.description: Canonical React hook for OpenDetail request, stream, and thread state built on the transport layer.

items.name: conversation-layout
items.title: Conversation Layout
items.description: Shared thread/body and composer regions for shell, sidebar, and modal layouts.

items.name: composer
items.title: Composer
items.description: Exact Figma input primitive with animated multiline layout plus send or stop action for an OpenDetail request.

items.name: thread
items.title: Thread
items.description: Thread container for OpenDetail conversations with optional Motion-based reveal.

items.name: user-message
items.title: User message
items.description: Question row primitive with the OpenDetail badge and muted query styling from the shell design.

items.name: assistant-message
items.title: Assistant message
items.description: Assistant answer primitive with inline loading and error states, optional image, markdown slot content, and response metadata.

items.name: assistant-sources
items.title: Assistant Sources
items.description: Expandable source-count metadata and citations list for assistant responses.

items.name: assistant-status
items.title: Assistant Status
items.description: Inline status primitive for loading spinners and red error copy inside assistant responses.

items.name: assistant-modal
items.title: Assistant Modal
items.description: Canonical full-page assistant overlay with a floating input and thread layer.
items.docs: Composes the input, user-message, response, and thread primitives into the installable website-style overlay shell.

items.name: assistant-sidebar
items.title: Assistant Sidebar
items.description: Global right sidebar assistant with built-in Cmd/Ctrl+J toggle behavior.
items.docs: Composes the input, user-message, response, and thread primitives into a fixed right-side assistant surface for app-wide use.

items.name: opendetail-base
items.title: OpenDetail Base Style
items.description: Base token contract and semantic classes for OpenDetail primitives. Install this before any OpenDetail style variant.
items.docs: Import the installed stylesheet from your app's global CSS entry after `@import "tailwindcss";`, for example `@import "@/styles/opendetail-base.css";`. It includes the shared OpenDetail token contract, inline status styling, and semantic component classes.

items.name: opendetail-midnight
items.title: OpenDetail Midnight
items.description: A cooler, darker token override that layers on top of the OpenDetail base style.

items.name: opendetail-signal
items.title: OpenDetail Signal
items.description: A warmer token override that layers on top of the OpenDetail base style.
